title: 240 Deer Road - Evergreen A-Frame Retreat
description: A real estate showcase campaign site for 240 Deer Rd in Evergreen, Colorado: an active $525,000 A-frame cabin with 3 beds, 1 bath, 1,270 square feet, one acre, mountain views, updated kitchen finishes, deck living, and room to grow.
